about.body: Dual-degree Electrical Engineering & Computing Technology student at uOttawa specializing in signal processing, algorithm design, and hardware-software optimization.
about.pillar_1_body: Building where hardware meets software — signal processing, embedded systems, and algorithm design shaped by real-world constraints.
about.pillar_2_body: Applying ML where it counts — from real-time drone audio detection to production pipelines modernizing high-voltage data systems.
about.pillar_3_body: Securing 30+ industry sponsors as IEEE Vice Chair and co-leading a 300-person conference that connects students with engineers.

cli.welcome: Portfolio CLI v1.0.0  —  type 'help' to get started.

data.bio: Dual-degree Electrical Engineering & Computing Technology student at uOttawa specializing in signal processing, algorithm design, and hardware-software optimization.

projects.counter_uav: Real-time drone detection system by audio, achieving 70% accuracy in national defence hackathon placing 4th out of 87 teams.
projects.weather_tracking: Live weather tracking system for aircraft using Arduino sensors and Chart.JS visualization with Python backend.
projects.spac: Organized a conference of 300+ attendees, raised thousands in sponsorship from 20+ industry partners.
projects.trench_nova: ML-driven pipelines modernizing legacy data aggregation systems for high-voltage equipment.

ieee_vice-chair.title: Vice Chair (formerly VP External)
ieee_vice-chair.description: Secured 30+ industry sponsors and partners, leading outreach strategy and managing two Industry Coordinators. Organized a Ciena Networking Night connecting 200+ students with engineers. Hosted Resume Roast panel with interns from Microsoft, Tesla, Meta, AMD, Nokia, and P&G.

spac_co_lead.title: Co-Lead, SPAC
spac_co_lead.description: Organized a conference of 300+ attendees for networking between students and professionals. Raised thousands of dollars in sponsorship by securing 20+ industry partners. Coordinated several hands-on workshops in parallel with networking and panelist presentations.
